_comment: Written by scripts/regen-src-golden.mjs (#91). `sha256` must match tests/fixtures/src-bundle.golden.js — tests/src-bundle-parity.test.ts enforces it, so a hand-edited golden, or one regenerated by any means that skips the reason prompt, fails the gate.
reason: #87: src/modules/guard.ts — the mainLoop/guiLoop error boundary (atGuard + atGuardErrors) joins the bundle via legacy-bridge.ts, and import-export.ts's resetAutoTrimps/resetModuleVars now restore the ATrunning latch in a finally. Emit-only: on the non-throwing path atGuard(n, fn) is exactly fn(), and all 14 L0 oracle traces reproduce byte-identically.
